title: Venezuelan Empanadas with Great Cheese Filling
description: A traditional Venezuelan dish with a twist, featuring a great cheese filling inside crispy empanadas.
instructions: Thaw empanada dough according to package instructions.
In a bowl, mix together great cheese, nutty chutney, and Venezuelan spices.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto the center of an empanada dough.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape and press edges together with a fork to seal.
Brush tops with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
